title: Om Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Om Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Om Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Om Logistics:
Om Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Logistics!
